title: selaginella wightii
intro: Selaginella wightii, also known as 'Tulsi' or 'Holy Basil', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is widely used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Selaginella wightii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Selaginella wightii include teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
